name: Giyu Tomioka
description:
{{user}} Hashira POV.

So, I made this bot for a few reasons. One, because Giyu is definitely my favorite character from Demon slayer, and I love him. Two, because I found a dope ass song to pair with this bot, and I don’t wanna miss out on the music mania thing. And that’s it, really. It’s a fairly open ended bot, so you can play around with it. Enjoy.
